Notes & Professional Observations

Data Definitions вҖ” Billing В· Contract В· Revenue (GL)

  • Revenue вҖ” GL (General Ledger): account balances by project Г— year 2018вҖ“2025 вҖ” includes non-billing items such as HO, internal units (DS, ME, HR, ST), adjustments Z_xxxxx and negatives (reversals) В· total 4,258,603,041.01 THB
  • Billing вҖ” Invoice (Issue Invoice actual / AR): the В«amount before VATВ» from the invoice-issuance report by project Г— year 2015вҖ“2026 (incl. 1 undated invoice of GLI22010) В· total 3,769,538,864.93 THB
  • Contract Value (Contract Amount): contract/PO value by project from the Contract Amt. column in report AR 4.3.1 (82 projects) В· total 5,023,917,577.36 THB вҖ” compared with Billing it shows billing progress (Billing Г· Contract)
  • Variance = Revenue (GL) вҲ’ Billing = +489,064,176.08 THB В· by-project status: matched to the baht 28 В· variance 43 В· GL only 26 В· Invoice only 11

Considerations

  • Different lenses: the variance reflects the gap between В«accounting revenue recognition (GL)В» and В«invoice issuance (AR)В», plus scope/timing differences вҖ” review the definitions before drawing conclusions
  • Some codes donвҖҷt map 1:1: the GL holds GLI25003 / 25008 / 25009 combined, while Invoice splits them #1 / #2 вҖ” this group is not a 1:1 match
  • File Book5: attachment not yet received вҖ” once sent (Excel/CSV preferred) it will be reconciled against the GL for an extra layer of verification
  • Current GL source: built from the numeric table provided by the user, reconciling to 4,258,603,041.01 вҖ” matching the userвҖҷs computed total to the baht
